recommendations.title: Taste of the Sea
recommendations.overview: A comedy about the adventures of several families during their sea vacations.

recommendations.title: The Jokes
recommendations.overview: In many small episodes, various characters represent the typical vices and comedy of Italian society in early 2000.

recommendations.title: Taste Of You
recommendations.overview: It depicts the lives of several groups of characters interacting at the beach of Forte dei Marmi during the mid-1980s.

recommendations.title: In This World of Thieves
recommendations.overview: A group of middle-aged time-share investors get ripped off and their desire for revenge is well-timed for them to be recruited by a bank clerk who feels the same about his employers.

recommendations.title: 2061 - Un anno eccezionale
recommendations.overview: In a post-apocalyptic future, the Italian peninsula is going through a dark moment due to a terrible energy crisis.

recommendations.title: Pretty Princess
recommendations.overview: A princess from a Nordic European country is obligated to marry the boy her family chose. She escapes and discovers love in the arms of a beautiful swimming teacher.

recommendations.title: Eccezzziunale... veramente - Capitolo secondo... me
recommendations.overview: The Milanese Donato returns from Spain, animated by the serious intention to go back to being the "ras della fossa". Second chapter of the famous 80s cult.

recommendations.title: Horse Fever: The Mandrake Sting
recommendations.overview: Mandrake and his new friends still continue to bet (and lose a lot of money) on horse races. What will they invent for cheating money?

recommendations.title: Eccezzziunale... veramente
recommendations.overview: Diego Abatantuono in the shoes of three huge fans: the Juventus truck driver Tirzan, the head of the ultra Milanese Donato and the Franco inter.

recommendations.title: A summer at the sea
recommendations.overview: Set against the sun-soaked shores of Italy in the summertime, seven different tales unfold about life, love, loss, family, and friendship.
